3169660.name: Looney Landers
3169660.description:
Looney Landers is the third title in the retro-inspired Class of 1983 arcade trilogy, following the critically acclaimed Donut Dodo and Cash Cow DX.

Your mission: skydive into Chucky Charly’s chaotic castle and land safely to win! But watch out - Charly has packed his home with zany contraptions designed to throw you off course. Outscoring your opponents will take speed, skill, and a dash of luck.

Perfect for players of all ages, Looney Landers offers fast, family-friendly arcade action with just the right amount of challenge. With quick sessions lasting only a few minutes, it’s the ideal pick-up-and-play game for fans of classic 80s vibes.

Key Features:

  • Versus Mode: P1 vs P2 or P1 vs CPU

  • Game Modes: CLASSIC, RANDOM & 5-LIVES

  • Difficulty Options: Easy & Hard

  • Retro Graphics: Vibrant 4-bit pixel art

  • Catchy Chiptunes: Original OPL FM music by naruto2413

  • Arcade Bezel: Illustration by Pete Ellison

  • Global Competition: Worldwide leaderboards

  • CRT TV Compatible: Native 240p output with 4:3 aspect ratio
